untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit Z-score calculation on a pairs spread (cl1 - hedge_ratio*cl2), which is not available as a pre-computed indicator. The spread itself must be constructed from two separate instruments with a calculated hedge ratio. bb_pct_b was used as a proxy for normalized deviation, but this does not replicate the exact mean-reversion pairs logic described in the original rule.
translation_notes: Original signal uses custom spread Z-score from pairs trading. Approximated using bb_pct_b (Bollinger Band %B) as a mean-reversion proxy, where values <-2 or >2 represent extreme deviations and values within ±1 represent mean reversion. However, this does not account for the dual-instrument hedge ratio and custom spread calculation. True implementation requires custom spread construction outside standard indicator set.
